label: Contact
subtitle: Every project is unique. Tell us what you're looking for, and we'll propose the solution best suited to your needs.
title: Contact us
subtitle_old: Our team is available to answer all your questions
form_succes_message: We have received your request. Our team will contact you within 24 hours.
form_erreur: An error has occurred. Please try again.
step_email_desc: To send you your personalised quote
step_produit_titre: Which product are you interested in?
step_besoin_desc: Tell us more about your project
step_localisation_desc: To adapt our offer to your region
rappel_jour: Which day is best for you?
reprendre_session: Picking up where you left off?
meta_desc: Contact Hallucine for a free quote. Inflatable cinema screens, tents, arches and furniture. Fast response, personalised advice.
r1_title: We'll get back to you within 24 hours
r1_desc: We are committed to responding to every enquiry within 24 working hours. For urgent enquiries, please state this in your message.
r2_desc: We deliver worldwide from our partner factory in Dongguan (China). Average delivery time: 2 to 4 weeks, depending on the destination.
r3_desc: Every quote is personalised and detailed. We include delivery costs, lead times and customisation options.
r4_desc: From design to delivery, we support you every step of the way. Technical advice, choosing options, monitoring the manufacturing process.
fab_desc: Our products are manufactured at our partner factory in Dongguan (Guangdong Province, China). This factory has specialised in inflatable structures for over 15 years.
qualite_desc: Every product is inspected and tested before dispatch. The founder personally oversees production.
expedition_desc: By sea (3–4 weeks) or by air (1–2 weeks, additional charge). We handle all customs formalities and arrange delivery to your door.
faq_q1: What are the production lead times?
faq_a1: For standard products (white or black, without customisation): 2 weeks. For customised products (colours, logo printing): 3 to 4 weeks. Delivery times are as follows: approximately 1 week for Europe, 2 weeks for the rest of the world.
faq_q2: Do you offer a rental service?
faq_a2: We do not offer rental services directly, but we work with a network of partner rental companies in several countries. Please contact us, specifying your requirements and location, and we will direct you to the nearest rental company.
faq_a3: Yes. Our partner factory is located in Dongguan, China, about an hour and a half from Shenzhen. If you’re in the area, we’d be delighted to welcome you for a tour. Please contact us to arrange an appointment.
faq_a4: We accept bank transfers (SEPA for Europe, SWIFT for international payments). For large orders, we offer payment in two instalments: 50% upon ordering, 50% before dispatch. Please contact us to discuss the details.
faq_a5: Yes. We offer special terms for resellers, rental companies and bulk buyers. Please contact us, stating your business and the volume you are considering, and we will provide you with a tailored quote.
